message:
fix: resolve endpoint stats, ingress display, and settings import defaults (#7532)

* fix: merge nested Prediction and TokenUsage defaults on settings import (#7501)

ImportEncrypted now backfills all zero-valued nested fields from
DefaultSettings(), not just AIMode/Theme/Widget. This prevents
incomplete imports from silently zeroing out prediction thresholds
and token usage limits.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: correct endpoint counts, ingress stats, and ingress host display (#7514, #7517, #7518, #7519)

- Endpoints stat now sums actual ready endpoints instead of service count
- Ingress stat on Network and Services dashboards uses real useIngresses data
- Ingress Status card host column reads 'hosts' array field (not 'host')
- Ingress search includes 'hosts' field for host-based filtering

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
